34. If the Ascendant Lord and the Moon Sign Lord are together in an Angle at birth, in aspect to
auspicious and friendly planets, unaspected by malefics and not being defeated by enemies,
the native will become a plentiful king. Alternatively the Moon should be in Lagna and the
Lagna Lord in the 9th thereof. The black forest bees consuming the ichor of his Army
elephants will sing the glory of such native in all directions.
35. Find out, if the Ascendant is the exaltation Sign of any planet. If the planet in question is
aspected by a benefic from an Angle a king si born. However, the first mentioned planet
should be in own Navansa, or friendly Navansa, or exaltation Navansa.
36. Saturn with strength, the Sun, Mars, the Moon, Venus and Mercury, respectively, positioned
in the second half of Capricorn, Leo, Aries, Cancer, Libra and Virgo will make one an
